### 1. Company Summary
Hive.app is an international end-to-end operations platform designed to optimize and scale e-commerce and direct-to-consumer (D2C) businesses. It offers a comprehensive suite of solutions covering order and inventory management, fulfillment, delivery, freight management, and integrations with e-commerce stores and tools. Hive emphasizes fast, reliable delivery (1-2 day delivery across Europe), operational transparency, and customer experience enhancements such as custom packaging and tracking/returns portals. The company supports over 500 brands, handling 75M+ shipped items annually with 99.9% accuracy, driving up to 24% revenue growth and 17% cost savings for clients. Hive also provides tailored growth management services to help brands scale efficiently.
